case_title: DAE WOONG YOON VS. KOREAN BAPTIS CHURCH OF SAN JOSE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(KYUNG S. YI)* SERVED JAN-22-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KOREAN BAPTIS CHURCH OF SAN JOSE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY YOON, DAE WOONG AS TO DEFENDANT KOREAN BAPTIS CHURCH OF SAN JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2011 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOON, DAE WOONG AS TO DEFENDANT KOREAN BAPTIS CHURCH OF SAN JOSE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOON, DAE WOONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KOREAN BAPTIS CHURCH OF SAN JOSE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
